text:
D0200C1_TRBL_SLEEP_CD D0200C1 Resident Mood Interview - Trouble Sleep Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates if the resident is having trouble falling or staying asleep, or is sleeping too
much. -=Not assessed/no information
0=No (enter 0 in column 2)
1=Yes (enter 0-3 in column 2)
9=No response (leave column 2 blank)
^=Blank (skip pattern) discontinued 09/30/2023
123 D0200C2_TRBL_SLEEP_FREQ_CD D0200C2_TRBL_SLEEP_FREQ_CD D0200C2 Resident Mood Interview - Trouble Sleep Frequency Code
